portfolio_rationale: GOOGL stands out with a perfect technical setup (all 6 bullish technical indicators, zero bearish) combined with strong fundamentals and a bear case that has fully collapsed, warranting the largest allocation. AMZN shares strong technicals and fundamentals but faces news headwinds, earning a meaningful second position. LLY's exceptional revenue growth (54%) and margins justify inclusion despite near-term technical weakness. AAPL receives a small allocation given mixed technicals and recurring liquidity flags. XOM is excluded due to an extreme RSI of 91 signaling near-certain mean reversion, and BRK.B is excluded due to persistent bearish technicals and an inconsistent signal history.

GOOGL.reason: Cleanest bull case in the universe: perfect technical alignment across all 6 indicators, strong ROE/ROA, and a bear case that has fully dissolved this week.

AMZN.reason: Strong technical setup matching GOOGL's breadth, solid fundamentals, and consistent 3-week bullish signal history, offset slightly by negative news sentiment.

LLY.reason: Exceptional fundamental quality (54% revenue growth, 83% gross margin) and positive news trends justify holding despite near-term bearish technical momentum.

AAPL.reason: Solid fundamentals and consistent bullish signal history warrant a small position, but mixed technicals and recurring liquidity flags limit conviction.

XOM.reason: RSI at 91 signals extreme overbought conditions with high mean-reversion risk, and the fundamental case is thin relative to other holdings.

BRK.B.reason: Persistent bearish technicals (price below all MAs, MACD below signal, RSI oversold), mixed signal history including a bearish verdict two weeks ago, and limited fundamental data undermine the bull case.
